attribution.name: Shadow Libraries
attribution.description: A curated directory of shadow (pirate) libraries — texts aggregated outside the legal framework of copyright — organized by access method.
attribution.note: Catalog compiled from the public ShadowLibraries directory. Anna indexes it as a browsable, searchable set of access points; it hosts none of the underlying content.

entries.name: Anna's Archive
entries.description: The largest open-data shadow library and a meta-search engine that aggregates Library Genesis, Sci-Hub, Z-Library and more into a single catalog of books, papers, comics and magazines. Anna itself is built on Anna's Archive's search architecture.

entries.name: Library Genesis (LibGen)
entries.description: A long-running community library aggregating millions of books, textbooks and academic articles, mirrored across several domains (libgen.is, libgen.rs, libgen.st).

entries.name: Academic Papers (Sci-Hub / Nexus-STC)
entries.description: Free access to paywalled research papers and journal articles by DOI, via Sci-Hub and successors such as the Nexus / Standard Template Construct collection.

entries.name: Internet Archive
entries.description: A non-profit digital library of books, audio, video and software, including the Open Library lending program and the Wayback Machine of archived web pages.

entries.name: Memory of the World
entries.description: A public library project with a curated, freely downloadable catalog of books, run as an act of civil disobedience against restrictive copyright.

entries.name: Lectulandia
entries.description: A popular Spanish-language ebook library with a large catalog of novels and non-fiction available for free download.

entries.name: Ebiblioteca
entries.description: A Spanish-language ebook collection offering free downloads across a broad range of genres.

entries.name: Epubera
entries.description: A Spanish-language site offering EPUB ebook downloads.

entries.name: Ebookelo
entries.description: Free Spanish-language ebooks in EPUB and PDF, organized by genre and author.

entries.name: Rave Book Search
entries.description: A search engine that aggregates ebook download links from multiple shadow libraries into a single query interface.

entries.name: Epublibre
entries.description: A Spanish-language community library that distributes carefully formatted EPUBs, also available as bulk torrent packs.

entries.name: Academic Torrents
entries.description: A distributed system for sharing large research datasets and academic collections over BitTorrent, designed for reproducible science.

entries.name: Torrent Packs
entries.description: Bulk torrent packs of entire book collections (for example Library Genesis data dumps) for archiving and re-seeding large corpora at once.

entries.name: #ebooks on irc.irchighway.net
entries.description: A friendly IRC channel primarily for fiction ebooks; search the trading bots with @search and request files directly in the channel.

entries.name: #bookz on irc.irchighway.net
entries.description: An IRC channel for technical books, audiobooks and larger book-related files, searched and downloaded through the channel's trading bots.

entries.name: @bookdownbot
entries.description: A Telegram bot for searching and downloading books in English directly inside the messenger.

entries.name: BibliotecaSecreta
entries.description: A directory that maintains an up-to-date list of working Telegram book bots as they rotate and change handles.

entries.name: ReadAnyBook
entries.description: Read a broad catalog of books online for free directly in the browser, no download required.

entries.name: Library Land
entries.description: An online reading platform with a large browsable catalog of books.

entries.name: BookFrom.net
entries.description: Read books online free, chapter by chapter, in several languages.

entries.name: Novel12
entries.description: Read novels online for free, organized by genre and series.

entries.name: ReadOnlineFreeBook
entries.description: Read full books online for free in the browser.
